g.text: Residual from expected cascade performance (percentage points)
Loss from care burden (2025 Q4, square-root scale)
Right of zero is above the fitted regional expectation. Point size scales with total documented loss from care.

text.style: font-size: 18.00px; font-weight: bold;fill: #14231F; font-family: "Times New Roman";

g.text: Top regions by combined lost to follow-up and documented off treatment.

text.style: font-size: 15.00px; font-weight: bold;fill: #14231F; font-family: "Times New Roman";

g.text: The quadrant identifies regions that underperform the fitted cascade pattern, while the ranked bars show where loss from care is concentrated.
